Here's a pattern I keep seeing:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Error><Code>InvalidToken</Code><Message>The provided token is malformed or otherwise invalid.</Message><Token-0></Token-0><RequestId>HZGWTN4HYK78JYJF</RequestId><HostId>Z7q0cj4Vrt4dBxomecw2j0YDklEWLXOdHcg/X73l+3hfWkCZfcfGFshwOMms3GUEsnAs0PgTzmCtv44z608OlT98xgQ/cuBs</HostId></Error>

—
What stands out to you? What would you add?
